Uses of Class
org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.SerializerSession

Packages that use SerializerSession
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.examples.serializer
Serializer Examples
org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson
BSON (Binary JSON) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor
CBOR (Concise Binary Object Representation) marshalling support per RFC 8949.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.csv
CSV Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hjson
Hjson (Human JSON) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hocon
HOCON (Human-Optimized Config Object Notation) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.html
HTML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.ini
INI format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jcs
JCS (JSON Canonicalization Scheme) Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena
RDF Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json
JSON Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5
JSON5 Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5l
JSON5L (JSON5 Lines) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonl
JSONL (JSON Lines) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.markdown
Markdown serializer and parser support for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.msgpack
MessagePack Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.oapi
OpenAPI Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parquet
Apache Parquet serialization and parsing support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.plaintext
Plaintext Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer
Serializer API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.soap
SOAP/XML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.sse
Server-Sent Events (SSE) marshalling support — text/event-stream.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream
Public low-level token-streaming API (pull parser + push generator) shared by every Juneau format.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.toml
TOML v1.0.0 serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.uon
UON Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.urlencoding
URL-Encoding Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml
XML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.yaml
YAML Marshalling Support

    Method
    Description
    void
    ImageSerializer.doSerialize(SerializerSession session, SerializerPipe pipe, Object o)
    Serializes a POJO to the specified pipe.

    Description

    Context object that lives for the duration of a single serialization of HtmlSerializer and its subclasses.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Object
    HtmlRender.getContent(SerializerSession session, T value)
    Returns the delegate value for the specified bean property value.
    String
    HtmlRender.getStyle(SerializerSession session, T value)
    Returns the CSS style of the element containing the bean property value.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    <T> SerializerSession
    SerializerSession.addVarBean(Class<T> c, T value)
    Adds a session object to the VarResolverSession in this session.
    SerializerSession
    SerializerSession.Builder.build()
     
    SerializerSession
    Serializer.getSession()
     
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer with parameters of type SerializerSession
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected void
    Serializer.doSerialize(SerializerSession session, SerializerPipe pipe, Object o)
    Serializes a POJO to the specified pipe.
    protected final String
    SerializerSession.getBeanTypeName(SerializerSession session, ClassMeta<?> eType, ClassMeta<?> aType, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta)
    Resolves the dictionary name for the actual type.
    Map<String,String>
    Serializer.getResponseHeaders(SerializerSession session)
    Optional method that specifies HTTP request headers for this serializer.
    void
    SerializerListener.onBeanGetterException(SerializerSession session, Throwable t, BeanPropertyMeta p)
    Called when an exception is thrown when trying to call a bean getter method.
    void
    SerializerListener.onError(SerializerSession session, Throwable t, String msg)
    Called when an error occurs during serialization but is ignored.

  • Uses of SerializerSession in org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream with parameters of type SerializerSession
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static RecordWriter
    RecordAdapter.arrayWriter(SerializerSession session, Object output)
    Creates an array-element RecordWriter that buffers each write(...) call and emits the whole list on RecordWriter.close().
    static RecordWriter
    RecordAdapter.writer(SerializerSession session, Object output)
    Creates a single-shot RecordWriter that delegates write(Object) calls to the session's serialize(...) entry point.
